platforms.name: Naver Blog
platforms.bestFor: Detailed explanations, keyword capture, consultation readiness education
platforms.format: Long-form post with clear headings, checklist blocks, and one practical example
platforms.hook: Start with the business owner's immediate risk or missed opportunity
platforms.asset: One cover image plus 2-3 checklist/table sections
platforms.cta: Link to the consultation checklist and invite a diagnostic call
platforms.avoid: Thin summaries, copied platform captions, exaggerated guarantee language
platforms.repurposeRule: Use the blog as the source article for all short-form derivatives

platforms.name: Instagram Carousel
platforms.bestFor: Step lists, mistakes, before-after readiness, compact visual frameworks
platforms.format: 7-9 slides with one idea per slide and a save-worthy final checklist
platforms.hook: Lead with a concrete mistake or surprising eligibility gap
platforms.asset: Square carousel, bold slide titles, minimal body copy
platforms.cta: Ask viewers to save the checklist and request diagnosis through the homepage
platforms.avoid: Dense legal text, generic motivational copy, unoriginal reposts
platforms.repurposeRule: Convert blog sections into one carousel sequence

platforms.name: Instagram Reels
platforms.format: 20-35 second vertical video with captions and a strong first 2 seconds
platforms.hook: Open with 'If your company is about to apply for funding, check this first'
platforms.asset: Vertical talking-head or desk scene with burned-in captions
platforms.cta: Comment or visit the checklist link before applying
platforms.avoid: Slow intro logos, overproduced stock clips, no captions
platforms.repurposeRule: Compress one carousel insight into one reel

platforms.name: YouTube Shorts
platforms.role: Quick topic testing and top-of-funnel reach
platforms.bestFor: One-question answers, misconceptions, short case breakdowns
platforms.format: 30-55 second vertical video with title text and spoken answer
platforms.hook: Ask the exact question the viewer would search or worry about
platforms.asset: Vertical video, captions, pinned comment pointing to the checklist
platforms.cta: Watch the related long video or open the consultation checklist
platforms.avoid: Pure entertainment without business utility, vague titles, no next step
platforms.repurposeRule: Turn every blog FAQ into one Short

platforms.name: YouTube Long-form
platforms.bestFor: Step-by-step funding preparation, certification comparisons, case walkthroughs
platforms.hook: Promise a practical decision framework in the first 15 seconds
platforms.asset: 16:9 video, chapter markers, pinned checklist link
platforms.cta: Download or open the checklist before consultation
platforms.avoid: Unstructured rambling, unsupported claims, missing chapters
platforms.repurposeRule: Expand the blog into a teaching script and cut Shorts from each section

platforms.name: TikTok
platforms.role: Pattern interruption and rapid hook testing
platforms.bestFor: Contrarian tips, quick audits, relatable founder mistakes
platforms.format: 15-30 second vertical video with immediate payoff
platforms.hook: Start with a strong 'Do not apply yet if...' warning
platforms.asset: Vertical video, captions, visual checklist overlay
platforms.cta: Ask viewers to check one condition and move to the homepage
platforms.avoid: Corporate tone, slow pacing, text too small for mobile
platforms.repurposeRule: Rewrite one Reel into a more direct warning or myth format

platforms.name: Facebook Page
platforms.bestFor: Business-owner explanations, event-style consultation notices, practical summaries
platforms.format: Short post plus image, with a clear phone/contact CTA
platforms.hook: Frame the post around a common owner situation
platforms.cta: Call or send a consultation inquiry
platforms.repurposeRule: Summarize the blog in 4-5 practical lines

platforms.name: LinkedIn Page
platforms.bestFor: Policy changes, strategic frameworks, B2B proof of expertise
platforms.format: Professional text post or document-style carousel
platforms.hook: Lead with a business implication, not a trend
platforms.asset: Document carousel or clean text post
platforms.cta: Invite founders and executives to review readiness before applying
platforms.avoid: Casual slang, unsupported performance promises, sales-only posts
platforms.repurposeRule: Turn the blog conclusion into a management insight
